components.value: V, S, F (a Medium creature’s skull or femur), DF

description.value: You animate a bone with necromantic energy, giving it the power to float near your body and interpose itself against physical attacks. You gain damage reduction 5/bludgeoning. Once the bone has prevented a total of 5 points of damage per caster level (maximum 50 points), it is destroyed and the spell is discharged. This spell has no effect if you have damage reduction from another source.
